body_txt: When a character wears the horseshoe mustache, it typically signals that they are manly , tough as nails, and twice as formidable. The mustache conveys maturity, resilience, and virility . In the 20th century, the horseshoe mustache became strongly associated with bikers, particularly the Hells Angels . Accordingly, horseshoe mustaches are often linked to biker and cowboy archetypes. Occasionally, they may also hint at the rebellious, combative nature of certain characters. Although a beard similarly signifies a character's rugged masculinity and toughness , a mustache suggests that the wearer is more image-conscious, as it requires regular grooming and trimming to maintain its shape and style. The mustache can also convey a sense of discipline and uniformity because some institutions require mustaches as part of their grooming regulations. In contrast, a full beard implies that the character is an enduring survivalist, with neither the time nor the interest for meticulous grooming. A messy, unkempt beard signals both slovenliness and an underlying despondency, implying the character has experienced tragedies from which they are still recovering . The horseshoe mustache was a staple of the American West and became a fashion trend in the 1970s. It is stereotypically associated with citizens of the southern United States, with the half-horseshoe often called "The Dallas Mustache." When exaggerated, the mustache suggests the wearer is exceptionally resilient or even nearly indestructible . In some cases, the mustache itself might be the source of the character's toughness and strength . Alongside the pencil mustache , the horseshoe mustache is linked to the LGBT community. It is a defining feature of the " Leatherman " archetype—a tough gay man clad in leather. In the 20th century, the leatherman subculture largely consisted of gay servicemen returning from World War II, and the mustache symbolized strength, toughness, ruggedness, and sexual liberation. Although the leatherman archetype is largely seen as a stereotype of the LGBT community, the mustache signals that this character is neither effeminate nor cowardly . When paired with sideburns, the horseshoe mustache becomes the gunslinger mustache. This combination reflects their hot-blooded temperament , as fighting is traditionally viewed as a "manly" or tough activity, or a way for men to resolve conflicts . If a horseshoe mustache alone signals toughness, then with sideburns, it implies that the wearer is someone who loves fighting and struggles with anger management. A soul patch is a facial hair style that originated with African-American men, particularly jazz musicians, in the 1940s and 1950s. When a horseshoe mustache is paired with a soul patch, it becomes "The Zappa," named after Frank Zappa note Although the Zappa mustache is described as a "full mustache with a wide soul patch," it closely resembles a half-horseshoe mustache (a.k.a. the "Dallas Mustache") . The Zappa mustache suggests the wearer is more hedonistic, implying they are as passionate about music as they are about fighting . Such characters might be music lovers , musicians in their downtime , or fighters who incorporate dance moves into their battle strategy or even use instruments as weapons . This should not be confused with the Fu Manchu mustache . The horseshoe mustache is thicker, features two vertical columns of hair that extend down to the chin, and forms an upside-down “U” shape. In contrast, the Fu Manchu mustache is thinner than the horseshoe, grows only from the corners of the upper lip, and hangs past the chin. Some variants of the Fu Manchu resemble a thin horseshoe or feature a shaved upper lip with hair left to grow solely at the corners. They are separated because the Fu Manchu carries distinct cultural baggage and a problematic history. This trope goes with Manly Facial Hair because it is a specific style of mustache that indicates toughness and power. Overlaps with Hoax Hogan , Macho Latino , and Magnificent Moustaches of Mexico . Not to be confused with Porn Stache , a style of mustache commonly associated with porn, which is usually a handlebar mustache, a chevron mustache, or a walrus mustache specifically, as that kind of mustache (porn stache) also carries sleazy connotations unlike this one (horseshoe stache). Not to be confused with Upper Class 'Stache . Can go with 'Stache of Duty .
